caption: A news broadcast segment features a red-themed graphical overlay with various portraits of political figures and scrolling headlines. The top banners across all frames read "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," and a "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo is visible in the upper right. Small portraits of individuals, including "सप्रत चौधरी," "विजय सिन्हा," "विजेंद्र यादव," and "श्रवण कुमार," are positioned on the sides. A central video window shows a man in a light-colored shirt and glasses speaking into multiple microphones, with the "ANI" logo visible on one. Below this, a ticker reads "सप्रत चौधरी, विजय सिन्हा को भी PM ने बधाई दी," and a timestamp indicates "10:04 PM." As the sequence progresses, the central video continues, and the portraits on the left change, eventually showing "नीतीश कुमार, CM, बिहार" and "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार" alongside the other graphics.
